maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Manage defects and inspections
maintenance.defectManagementDescription: Create defect reports, track repairs, and update statuses
maintenance.inspectionDescription: Manage inspection intervals and review overdue inspections
maintenance.inspectionsSubtitle: Manage inspection intervals and upcoming inspections

apiSettings.title: API Limits
apiSettings.subtitle: Configure the maximum number of devices and cases loaded by the API
apiSettings.deviceLimitDesc: Maximum number of devices loaded when accessing the label page and other requests.
apiSettings.caseLimitDesc: Maximum number of cases loaded when accessing the label page and other requests.
apiSettings.recommended: Recommended: 50000 for normal use, higher for very large inventories
apiSettings.recommendedCases: Recommended: 50000 for normal use, higher for many cases
apiSettings.note1: Very high limits may impact performance
apiSettings.note2: The limits apply only to API requests, not to the database
apiSettings.note3: Changes take effect immediately, no restart required
apiSettings.note4: With very large datasets, loading may take longer

export.title: CSV Export
export.subtitle: Export different datasets as CSV files for Excel or other applications. All exports use UTF-8 encoding and German CSV format (semicolon separated).

notes.title: Important Notes for CSV Export
notes.encodingText: All CSV files use UTF-8 with BOM for optimal Excel compatibility
notes.delimiterText: Semicolon (;) as column separator (German CSV format)
notes.excelImportText: Files can be opened directly in Excel. If there are issues, use "Data → From Text/CSV"

products.label: All Products
products.description: Exports all products with basic data (ID, name, description, category, etc.)

products-with-count.label: Products with Device Counts
products-with-count.description: All products with counts of available, on-job, and defective devices

products-with-brand.label: Products with Brand & Manufacturer
products-with-brand.description: All products including manufacturer and brand information

devices.label: All Devices
devices.description: Complete device list with status, serial number, purchase date, and location

manufacturers.label: All Manufacturers
manufacturers.description: List of all manufacturers with country, website, and notes

brands.label: All Brands
brands.description: List of all brands with manufacturer assignment

zones.label: All Storage Zones
zones.description: Storage zones with type, barcode, capacity, and device count

cables.label: All Cables
cables.description: Cables with type, connectors, length, and specifications

jobs.label: All Jobs
jobs.description: Jobs with date, customer, status, and device count

brandsManufacturers.confirmDeleteManufacturer: Delete this manufacturer? Brands assigned to this manufacturer will not be deleted.

rolesTab.selectUserHint: Select a user to manage roles

fields.activeHelp: Product is active and can be used in jobs

ledSettings.title: LED Behavior
ledSettings.subtitle: Configure the appearance and behavior of LED lighting
ledSettings.singleBinSubtitle: Default appearance for the "Highlight bin" function
ledSettings.previewBinHint: Leave empty to automatically use the first bin from mapping.
ledSettings.jobSubtitle: Configure LED appearance in job visualization
ledSettings.jobModeHintAllBins: All bins light up: required bins stand out via different colors/patterns.
ledSettings.jobModeHintRequiredOnly: Only bins with devices still to pack light up; all others are switched off.
ledSettings.requiredBinsDescription: Used when devices still need to be packed in a bin.
ledSettings.nonRequiredBinsDescription: Bins not needed for the current job.
ledSettings.mappingSubtitle: Assign LED pixels to individual areas (e.g. bins, grid boxes). Configuration is persisted in the container and survives deployments.
ledSettings.mappingLoadFailed: Mapping could not be loaded. Check server logs.
ledSettings.defaultAppearanceHint: Define the default appearance for LED highlights in mapping
ledSettings.noGroups: No groups created yet. Add one via "Add group".
ledSettings.groupIdentifier: Group identifier (e.g. Shelf A, Grid box 1)
ledSettings.zoneTypeSubtitle: Adjust LED behavior for individual zone types

messages.previewStartedFor: ✓ Preview for {{target}} started - "Stop preview" ends lighting.
